exploration_notes: The overflow state is defined in `envoy/common/conn_pool.h` as `PoolFailureReason::Overflow` (line 98). The overflow condition is emitted from two places in `source/common/conn_pool/conn_pool_base.cc`: (1) `newStreamImpl()` (line 284) triggers overflow when pending requests exceed the resource limit, and (2) `attachStreamToClient()` (line 178) triggers overflow when max requests are exceeded. Additionally, `source/common/upstream/conn_pool_map_impl.h` increments the `upstream_cx_pool_overflow_`
